def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Derive new features by considering the physical meaning and relationships inherent in the data, 
    and then remove less informative features to enhance overall performance.
    """
    
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Normalize weight and distance differences
    df_output['left_weight_normalized'] = df_output['Left-Weight'] / (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight'])
    df_output['right_weight_normalized'] = df_output['Right-Weight'] / (df_output['Left-Weight'] + df_output['Right-Weight'])
    df_output['left_distance_normalized'] = df_output['Left-Distance'] / (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance'])
    df_output['right_distance_normalized'] = df_output['Right-Distance'] / (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Take logarithm of weight differences
    df_output['weight_difference_log'] = np.log(df_output['weight_difference'] + 1)
    
    # Calculate the minimum of normalized weight and distance differences
    df_output['left_weight_diff_min'] = np.minimum(df_output['left_weight_normalized'], df_output['left_distance_normalized'])
    df_output['right_weight_diff_min'] = np.minimum(df_output['right_weight_normalized'], df_output['right_distance_normalized'])
    
    # Calculate the maximum of normalized weight and distance differences
    df_output['left_weight_diff_max'] = np.maximum(df_output['left_weight_normalized'], df_output['left_distance_normalized'])
    df_output['right_weight_diff_max'] = np.maximum(df_output['right_weight_normalized'], df_output['right_distance_normalized'])
    
    # Calculate the product of weight and distance differences
    df_output['weight_product'] = df_output['weight_difference'] * (df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Calculate the ratio of weight to distance differences
    df_output['weight_to_distance_ratio'] = df_output['weight_difference'] / (df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
